creator: homaei@corebox.ir
text:
You stopped the discussion and started DDOS attack other BSD groups !!!
Your behavior and language are not polite at all.
You said: "We are waiting for the anniversary to put the contents"
anniversary for what? is it a wedding party?
you just put a single page of Farsi and you call it contents?
making some photos and then share on twitter?
private meeting with your friends?
this is the picture you trying to show?
what do you mean by earlier?
I know you are excited so much but the event is real as always and public everybody been invited but we can not tolerate the rudeness. the meetbsd is a friendly and professional group and we don't care if somebody likes it or not.

This is what is going on "meetbsd.ir":

1-we are answering questions via email or WhatsApp every day
2-we co-located a full rack server for providing Iranian users
3-we submitting the professional article on bsdmag
4-we have a yearly conference and this not about removal or you. it depends on sponsors.
5-we are trying to be connected with other groups

keep being happy, this is what we need these days
